## Summary

Describe the SDK behavior or documentation change.

## Verification

List the commands you ran, for example `npm test`, `go test ./...`, `swift test`, or the package-specific command from CONTRIBUTING.md.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused on one concern.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated README or docs when public behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, API keys, tokens, cookies, private URLs, or customer data.
- [ ] I checked that public copy does not mention external vendors or internal implementation notes.
